description:
Executor the desktop workflow application for Windows. Speed up your daily workflow, opening things and doing things.

Executor the desktop workflow application for Windows. Speed up your daily workflow, opening things and doing things.

Key Features:
- Launch applications, files, folders, websites, web services (with parameters) and prompts in milliseconds.
- Trigger multiple actions with one text command and/or hotkey.
- Let's be an expert in opening up the world instead of trying to put the whole world inside of Executor (as some alternatives try to do).
- Take the clipboard to a new level, swiftly trigger system commands, do fast calculations, manage running applications and more.
- Tailor keywords, appearance, hotkeys, and behavior to perfectly match your daily workflow.
- Customize the look and feel with various skins and theming options to match your desktop setup.
What's New
- Executor has an online skin editor located here. The editor can export (and import) zip files with all skin assets that can be loaded into Executor.
- Tiled background pictures for scale type skins can now be centered, and set to emulate it's only one picture for both the input and list, zoomed to fit as a cover, plus more. This done by using the skin properties skintilepictureposition and listtilepictureposition More info here. This is also available in the Online Skin Editor (see list tile position).
- There's a shortcut to open the "skin editor" and "list appearance wizard" from within Executor > Settings > "Visual / Skin"
- Browsing for skins now also supports .zip files instead of only .skn files. If selecting a .zip file this will be unpacked to a "skins" folder in Executors data folder (can type -folder to open this folder).
- Typing -skin will open the skin settings. Also takes a skin name, like -skin scale_dark, also supports a URL to a skin, like -skin https://somewhere.com/myskin.zip, also -skin o or -skin openwill open the skin file dialog, and -skin op will open file dialog and stay in settings. -sk also works
- Added the default keyword skins that will open an online skins menu with some skins and some options. If you don't have this keyword you can import it using the imports keyword.
- Added $SENDTEXT2$ this will instead of emulating keyboard strokes (done by $SENDTEXT$) paste the text, making it faster. It supports {BR} for linebreaks. Because it's using the clipboard to send text it will only preserve the old clipboard if old clipboard contains text.
- Added $SENDTEXT3$ like $SENDTEXT2$ but will also emulate pressing enter on keyboard after pasting text.
Fixes
- Fixed some GDI object leaks on resizing.
- Fixed various smaller memory leaks.
